title: BarkinMad Coins
description: How BarkinMad Coins work in ZXSnake and how the shared ZX Series reward model is intended to be used.
summary: Coins are a shared progression currency in the ZX Series with cosmetic and account-level utility.
sourceNotes: Only use wording that matches shipped reward behavior.
Update this page if coin source rates or unlock rules change in app releases.

sections.heading: What is the coin system?
paragraphs: BarkinMad Coins are earned through gameplay and support unlock progression for cosmetic content.
The system is designed to be shared across supported ZX Series titles.

sections.heading: Shared progression model
paragraphs: Coins are intended to move with the player profile in ways aligned with ZX Series design.
Use this as a long-term progression layer in addition to score and achievement goals.

sections.heading: Best practice
paragraphs: Focus first on consistency and completion goals, then convert stronger play sessions into cosmetic unlock progress over time.
